steps.title: Spot the plural subject
steps.content: The subject of the sentence is “Fans of the film” — a plural noun. This is the grammatical clue that determines which verb form must be used.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: The rule is subject-verb agreement: the verb must match its subject in number. Since “Fans” is plural, “recognize” is the correct plural form. The other three options are all singular verb forms that do not agree with the plural subject. That matches choice C — C is correct.
